title: phyllanthus verrucicaulis
intro: Phyllanthus verrucicaulis is a plant species, also known as the rough-leaved phyllanthus, that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus verrucicaulis include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an immunomodulator. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
